creator: dbaio@freebsd.org
text:
Hi.

I've got a problem compiling mysql51-server on FreeBSD 11 (readline related), so I changed the patch for putting readline as default.

Another round of poudriere tests:

[mysql51-server]

FreeBSD 8.4
